title: Expedition Led by 'Ubayadah
description: (He also says that) in this year, eight months after the Hijrah, in Shawwal (April 623), the Messenger of God entrusted a white banner to 'Ubaydah b. al-Harith b. al-Muttalib b. 'Abd Manaf and ordered him to march to Batn Rabigh. His banner was carried by Mistah b. Uthathah. He reached the pass of al-Marah, which is near al-Julhfah, at the head of sixty Emigrants without a single Ansari (Muslim of Medina) among them. They met the polythe21. This is usually known as the expedition of Sif al -Bahr; cf. IH, 419-21; W, 9f.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
